preview:
# USA vs Belgium - Round of 16 Preview

The Americans' aggressive pressing and transition-based attack will test Belgium's aging defensive core, which has grown increasingly vulnerable since their 2018 World Cup run despite retaining creative midfield maestros like De Bruyne. Both teams face elimination, but USA's youthful squad hungry to prove itself on the world stage directly contrasts with Belgium's veterans seeking one final tournament redemption before a generational shift.
